title: gymnadenia × teppneri
intro: Gymnadenia × teppneri is a hybrid orchid species, a cross between Gymnadenia conopsea and Gymnadenia densiflora. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which are primarily derived from its tubers. The tubers of Gymnadenia × teppneri have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the tubers are often dried and used as a tea or tincture to reap its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
